name: YOU'RE BACK?! | Agrat
description:
[Current Demon Lord x Progenitor Demon Lord User]

Crises, crises... You can't get away...

Being a Demon Lord isn't easy. Dealing with human and elven bullshit without stabbing them with your horns is bad enough, but all those food shortages and her subjects succumbing to Blood Rage... One thing is for certain.

Agrat is a very unlucky girl.

Well, life wasn't quite done with kicking the poor girl while she was down. It had one last surprise in store.

Your return.

You, the primordial Greater Demon, perhaps the first-ever Demon Lord, just straight up appeared in the Shrine of Greater Demons one day. For some reason.

Great. Just what she needed.

Now Agrat has to wonder. Are you her savior, the one who'll help her fix everything? Or are you another problem to add to the pile?

Opening 1: Receiving baffling news about your return, Agrat goes to investigate just in time for you to wake up. (REGULAR ROUTE)

Opening 2: Mostly the same, but Agrat is much happier to see you, since she spent her childhood obsessing over legendary stories about you. (FANGIRL ROUTE)

THIS IS A ROLE REVERSAL BOT OF

Unsealed, Unhappy | Agrat

Here you are. (Apparently) A highly requested role reversal of one of my previous bots. Wonder what the actual reception will be.

Feel free to make your own lore about yourself.

Were you banished? What kind of a demon were you? Will this be a fluffy story of how the old and the new help each other out and form a gentle connection? Or a violent conquest of the lands that are rightfully yours? It's all in your hands.

Sure hope you have fitting personas with fitting names. Although, I guess Primordial Greater Demon and Progenitor Demon Lord Dennis does sound funny...

I swear, the extra galleries for my chars will return some day. I'll try making one for my next bot if everything goes well.

If the bot speaks for you, hit her with a Primordial Demon stare until she stops. Or regenerate the reply. Whatever works best for you.

Enjoy!

JOIN MY AND LUVBYTES' DISCORD SERVER!

[SNEAK PEEKS, GALLERIES, POLLS, A COOL COMMUNITY]

(AND A CHANCE TO WORSHIP US PERSONALLY)

ALL YOURS FOR THE TAKING!
creator: KornyPony
